set_fields.description: Inject phase-appropriate instructions into the system prompt and user messages.nn## before_agent_start hooknWhen forge is active, append phase instructions to system prompt:n- IMPLEMENTING: mention forge_done, suppress forge_reviewn- REVIEWING: mention forge_review, suppress forge_donenn## IMPLEMENT prompt (via sendUserMessage into fresh session)n```nFORGE: <task-id> | Cycle <N> | IMPLEMENTn---n## Taskn<backlog item title + description>nn## Review Feedbackn<state.lastFeedback or 'First cycle.'>nn---nWork on the task. Add progress notes via backlog comment.nCall forge_done when this implementation pass is complete.nDo not close the task.n```nn## REVIEW prompt (via sendUserMessage into same session)n```nFORGE: <task-id> | Cycle <N> | REVIEWn---n## Taskn<backlog item title + description>nn---nReview the implementation work.nCall forge_review with verdict:n  - { verdict: 'reject', feedback: 'what is wrong' }n  - { verdict: 'complete' }n```nn## Reviewer model overridenIf state.reviewer.model is set, switch model before injecting review prompt (pi.setModel).nn## DoDn- Prompts injected at correct phase transitionsn- No emoji in promptsn- Reviewer uses reviewer mode promptn- Model override works when configured
